title: equisetum limosum subsp. fluviatile
intro: Equisetum limosum subsp. fluviatile, also known as swamp horsetail or river horsetail, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which are attributed to the high concentration of silicates and other compounds present in its rhizomes and stems. The health benefits of Equisetum limosum subsp. fluviatile include its ability to treat urinary issues, such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
